title: Glitched Legacy
description: A horror-themed Minecraft modpack recreating the eerie atmosphere of the Alpha era with broken visuals, immersive fog, and unsettling ARG-style events.
body:
![Glitched Legacy logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cc0d855914964a6fa7c3577ac5ec5544de753dc_0.webp)
**Glitched Legacy**
is a horror-themed Minecraft modpack that recreates the eerie atmosphere of the Alpha era. Featuring broken visuals, immersive fog, and unsettling ARG-style events, it delivers the feeling of playing a corrupted or forgotten version of the game.

### 🕳 Features:
- Distorted visuals and ambient glitches
- Thick dynamic fog for immersive atmosphere
- Alpha-style retro textures (Golden Days resource pack)
- Shader support via Oculus

### 🖤 Special thanks to:
-   wendigodrip (the broken script)
-  EBALIA (000.jar, in your world)
-  dregir5 (inside the system)

##   ⚠️  WARNING — This modpack contains experimental horror mods with potentially disturbing behavior.

Included mods like Inside the System and The Broken Script are designed for ARG and horror purposes. They may:

- Crash the game intentionally as part of scripted sequences

- Display your IP address in-game (Inside the System)

- Create text files on your computer

- ban you from worlds

#### These actions are purely local and do not transmit data externally, but are meant to unsettle the player and simulate a “haunted” or “glitched” game.

#### 🛑 If you're uncomfortable with these effects, do not install this modpack.

### use /tbs_config to remove black borders, and enable safe mode.
### Fog distance can be adjusted by pressing F, just like in the alpha versions of Minecraft.
